content: Do not preemptively create scripts/scheduler_lib.sh or move a scheduler.sh predicate function into it while refining a narrow bug fix — the sourceable-library extraction (splitting scheduler.sh's pure predicates into scheduler_lib.sh, mirroring gate_lib.sh) is owned by issue #185, a separate not-yet-implemented refactor that also rewires the SCHEDULER_SOURCE_ONLY guard and re-points test sourcing. A size:S fix to a single predicate (e.g. dependencies_met() in #204) should stay self-contained in scheduler.sh so #185 can relocate it wholesale later with no rework.
